subcodes.first_line: Your mention hath been and remaineth with the Wronged One. We beseech God to aid thee in that which is befitting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر شما لدی المظلوم بوده و هست از حق میطلبیم ترا موید فرماید بر آنچه سزاوار
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @rejection by the people of the Bayan
